question_text: A tidal power station produces 2000 kW of power continuously. How much energy is generated in one day?
explanation: Energy = Power × Time. First convert one day to hours: 1 day = 24 hours. Energy = 2000 kW × 24 h = 48,000 kWh. This equals 48 MWh (megawatt-hours) or 1.728 × 10^8 joules.
